channel.title: Autoit on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in Autoit on ExitCode0

item.title: Copy Paste in vSphere before installing VMware tools
item.description: Send text to a vSphere VM before VMware Tools is installed using AutoIT keystrokes. Bypass clipboard limitations during fresh OS installs and initial VM configuration.

item.title: Automatically pause Spotify with the 3CX client
item.description: Automatically pause Spotify when a 3CX VoIP call arrives using an AutoIT background script. Prevent music playing over calls with a lightweight tray application.
